name: Scheduled dosing and assessment completion in IPF D+Q randomized pilot
summary: Primary pilot-trial conduct outcome capturing scheduled dose completion, planned assessment completion, and abstract-reported between-arm clinical measure interpretation in the IPF randomized pilot.
measurement_method: Completion counts for scheduled trial doses and planned assessments, with abstract-reported between-arm clinical measure interpretation
timepoint: 3-week intervention period and planned pilot assessments

provenance.locator: PubMed PMID 36857968 abstract METHODS and FINDINGS
provenance.note: Abstract reports the randomized dosing schedule and exact scheduled-dose and planned-assessment completion counts.
